---
name: dev
description: Start the Next.js development server.
---

# /dev

Start the ResQ landing site in development mode.

## Steps

1. Verify `.env.local` exists (copy from `.env.example` if not).
2. Run `bun dev`.
3. Confirm the server started at `http://localhost:3000`.
4. Note any missing env var warnings from `@t3-oss/env-nextjs`.
